nasb.text: Then Gideon and the 300 men who were with him came to the Jordan and crossed over, weary yet pursuing.

esv.text: And Gideon came to the Jordan and crossed over, he and the 300 men who were with him, exhausted yet pursuing.

cnv.text: 基甸來到約旦河，就過了河；他和與他在一起的三百人雖然都很疲乏，仍然追趕敵人。

ccb.text: 基甸率领他的三百人渡过约旦河，虽然疲惫不堪，仍紧追敌人。
